Cinematic Immersive / AI consulting for women leaders

From circuits to boardrooms, the story has always been scale.

Lakecia’s career moves through the hidden machinery of power: defense systems, enterprise platforms, CEO offices, public boards, and founder ecosystems.

Start the conversation

Origin

Before the titles, there was the engineering discipline of digital logic design for the Department of Defense: precision, consequence, and systems thinking.

Ascent

Then came Microsoft CTO leadership, Chief of Staff work to Intel’s CEO, $1B+ platform experience, IDEX board service, TechArena.ai advisory, and ROAR.

Presence

The result is not a consultant performing certainty. It is a leader who understands pressure and can help you make it usable.

Ready for the next room?

Bring the pressure, the ambition, and the open questions. Lakecia will help you turn them into a leadership position.

Contact
Lakecia Gunter · AI consulting for women leaders · ROAR-informed leadership.
